openFindings.title: Packet claims strict validation passes, but current strict validation fails
evidence: spec.md:112 defines REQ-001 as strict validation exiting 0 or 1, never 2.
plan.md:59 marks strict packet validation complete.
implementation-summary.md:87 claims strict validation passed with exit 0 and 0 warnings.
Current review run: validate.sh exited 2 with SPEC_DOC_INTEGRITY errors for 15 missing markdown references and one continuity freshness warning.
openFindings.impact: The packet cannot truthfully remain complete while its primary P0 completion gate fails.
openFindings.remediation: Update stale evidence paths, rerun strict validation, and only then restore complete status.

openFindings.title: Runtime verification paths point to a deleted skill-advisor location
evidence: plan.md:119-120 uses .opencode/skill/skill-advisor/scripts/*.py commands.
tasks.md:69-71 and checklist.md:64-66 mark those commands complete.
implementation-summary.md:83-85 records PASS results for the same deleted path.
Current review run: .opencode/skill/skill-advisor does not exist; the live scripts are under .opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/skill-advisor/scripts/.
openFindings.impact: A future operator following the packet cannot reproduce the recorded verification commands.
openFindings.remediation: Rewrite command evidence to the current nested skill-advisor path and refresh command outputs.

openFindings.title: Current compiler validation fails even at the live nested path
evidence: checklist.md:65 claims skill graph metadata validation passes.
implementation-summary.md:84 records VALIDATION PASSED.
Current review run at .opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/skill-advisor/scripts/skill_graph_compiler.py --validate-only returned exit 2 with zero-edge warnings for sk-deep-research and sk-git.
openFindings.impact: The packet overstates graph metadata health; changing only command paths would still not make the validation evidence true.
openFindings.remediation: Resolve the current graph metadata validation errors or downgrade the packet completion claims until they are resolved.

openFindings.title: Grep-zero and scope claims still target the old 011/007 root after the packet moved to 002
evidence: spec.md:32, spec.md:115, and spec.md:133 require checks over 011-skill-advisor-graph.
decision-record.md:49 and checklist.md:67 repeat the 011-root gate.
Current review run: no 011-skill-advisor-graph directory exists under the current 006-search-routing-advisor parent; the active phase root is 002-skill-advisor-graph.
openFindings.impact: The completion gate can be satisfied against a historical alias while missing stale references under the active root.
openFindings.remediation: Rebase the grep-zero gate and related prose to the current 002-skill-advisor-graph root, preserving old paths only as explicit aliases in metadata.

openFindings.title: description.json parentChain disagrees with the current packet location
evidence: description.json:14-19 lists parentChain ending in 011-skill-advisor-graph.
graph-metadata.json:3-5 correctly places the packet under 006-search-routing-advisor/002-skill-advisor-graph.
description.json:25 and graph-metadata.json:246 both identify the current spec folder as 002-skill-advisor-graph/005-repo-wide-path-migration.
openFindings.impact: Memory/search surfaces may route or display this packet under the wrong phase root.
openFindings.remediation: Normalize description.json parentChain to the current path and keep 011 only in aliases/migration history.

openFindings.title: Continuity frontmatter is stale relative to refreshed graph metadata
evidence: spec.md:16, plan.md:15, tasks.md:15, checklist.md:15, decision-record.md:15, and implementation-summary.md:15 keep last_updated_at at 2026-04-13T00:00:00Z.
description.json:11 and graph-metadata.json:219 show April 21 migration/save timestamps.
Current strict validation emitted CONTINUITY_FRESHNESS warning with deltaMs=738000000.
openFindings.impact: Resume surfaces will look stale even after the packet was migrated on April 21.
openFindings.remediation: Refresh continuity frontmatter after the packet is corrected and re-saved.

openFindings.title: The packet never names the two forbidden legacy patterns it claims to grep
evidence: spec.md:115 and tasks.md:72 refer to two forbidden patterns without naming them.
implementation-summary.md:86 records a final scoped grep but omits the actual rg expression.
The active root now contains many stale .opencode/skill/skill-advisor/scripts references, so the unnamed pattern set is ambiguous.
openFindings.impact: Future reviewers must reverse-engineer the intended grep gate, which increases the chance of false closure.
openFindings.remediation: Record the exact rg command and patterns in the checklist and implementation summary.
